title: Bhitarkanika National Park
tagline: Bhitarkanika National Park — wildlife reserve of Odisha

overview.short: Bhitarkanika National Park is a 145 km2 (56 sq mi) national park in northeast Kendrapara district in Odisha in eastern India.
overview.description: Bhitarkanika National Park is a 145 km2 (56 sq mi) national park in northeast Kendrapara district in Odisha in eastern India. It was designated on 16 September 1998 and obtained the status of a Ramsar site on 19 August 2002. The area is also been designated as the second Ramsar site of the State after the Chilika Lake. It is surrounded by Bhitarkanika Wildlife Sanctuary, which spread over 672 km2 (259 sq mi).

topPlaces.name: Satabhaya, Odisha
topPlaces.description: Satabhaya is a village and a beach located on the coastal side of Kendrapara District in Odisha, India. prone to natural calamities like the deposition of sand dunes causing great havoc to the inhabitants since time immemorial.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhitarkanika National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhitarkanika National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhitarkanika National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (125 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (123 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhitarkanika National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhitarkanika National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhitarkanika National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Bhitarkanika National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhitarkanika National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Satabhaya, Odisha.
